title: Amethyst Buddies
description: Adds a unique texture to the clusters and makes the budding amethyst block more visible.
body:
# Amethyst Buddies **Hi!** In this pack, you have unique icons for Amethyst Buds and Amethyst Clusters. I also changed the Budding Amethyst block, to make it more visible while mining! So you have a smaller chance to break it!
**Hope you like it!**
